ws_e674dp7sny.markdownContent:
# Welcome to ScribeSlide AI

- Welcome to your personal account workspace, vivek!
- This is slides dashboard where you can edit individual presentation slides.
- Try typing some details or pasting layout notes in the editor on the right!

## Real-Time Navigation

- Re-arrange, visual select, and review slides seamlessly on the left.
- Standard custom grid display allows easy list management.
- Use **New Slide** or **Delete Slide** to control slide stacks.

## Multi-Format Uploads & Images

- Copy/Paste or Drag & Drop images directly into the Markdown Editor!
- Embedded Base64 raw graphics are saved effortlessly in real-time.
- Clean markdown visual assets rendered instantaneously in preview.
